content: Duolingo gamification analysis: WORKS for retention: (1) Streaks - 3x more likely to return daily, uses loss aversion (60% more commitment reported); (2) XP + leaderboards - 40% more engagement, competitive social pressure. PROBLEMATIC: (1) Streaks become the goal rather than learning - users complete trivial tasks just to keep streak; (2) Leaderboards encourage grinding not learning; (3) XP can be farmed with easy content; (4) Gamification can undermine intrinsic motivation (overjustification effect). Key lesson: metrics that track genuine mastery are better than activity metrics. A streak of 'played WC3 today' is gameable and doesn't measure improvement. Avoid: pure time-on-app metrics, XP for clicking through content, badges for completing nodes without assessment.
